portfolio.title: One Creative
portfolio.description: Percetakan Bau-Bau terbaik dan terlengkap. Melayani jasa cetak undangan, tiket pesawat, agen PELNI, dan top up game murah.
portfolio.description_en: Best and most complete printing service in Bau-Bau. Providing invitation printing, flight tickets, PELNI agent services, and affordable game top-ups.
portfolio.full_description: Website resmi PT. ONE CREATIVE AIO, pusat layanan digital dan percetakan terpadu di Kota Bau-Bau. Platform ini dirancang dengan standar teknologi web modern (AI-Native) dan optimasi SEO tingkat lanjut untuk mendominasi pasar lokal (Percetakan, Tiket PELNI, dan Top Up Game).
portfolio.full_description_en: The official website of PT. ONE CREATIVE AIO, an integrated digital service and printing center in Bau-Bau City. This platform is designed with modern web technology standards (AI-Native) and advanced SEO optimization to dominate the local market (Printing, PELNI Tickets, and Game Top-Ups).
portfolio.impact: Berhasil mencapai skor SEO 100% pada audit profesional. Melalui strategi Topical Authority (Silo Content) dan JSON-LD Schema Markup, situs ini mendapatkan Rich Snippets di Google dan mendominasi kata kunci pencarian lokal.
portfolio.impact_en: Successfully achieved a 100% SEO score in professional audits. Through Topical Authority strategy (Silo Content) and JSON-LD Schema Markup, the site gains Rich Snippets in Google and dominates local search keywords.
portfolio.process: Proses pengembangan menggunakan pendekatan Performance-First dengan framework Astro. Melibatkan optimasi Technical SEO yang ekstrem (Sitemap, Robots.txt, Gtag.js) serta pemetaan konten berbasis Silo untuk membangun otoritas topik.
portfolio.process_en: The development process uses a Performance-First approach with the Astro framework. It involves extreme Technical SEO optimization (Sitemap, Robots.txt, Gtag.js) and Silo-based content mapping to build topical authority.
portfolio.tech_rationale: Astro dipilih untuk Static Site Generation guna menghasilkan kecepatan muat halaman instan (Zero JS by default), yang sangat krusial bagi dominasi SEO di pasar lokal Bau-Bau. Integrasi html2canvas memungkinkan fitur HD screenshot untuk jadwal kapal bagi pengguna mobile.
portfolio.tech_rationale_en: Astro was chosen for Static Site Generation to achieve instant page load speeds (Zero JS by default), which is crucial for SEO dominance in the local Bau-Bau market. The html2canvas integration enables HD screenshot features for ship schedules for mobile users.
highlights: Ranking #1 Google untuk Kata Kunci Lokal

portfolio.title: Aindea
portfolio.description: Asisten Digital Bahasa Wolio berbasis AI untuk preservasi budaya Buton. Menggunakan teknik Hybrid AI Reasoning.
portfolio.description_en: AI-powered Wolio Digital Assistant for Buton cultural preservation. Utilizing Hybrid AI Reasoning techniques.
portfolio.full_description: Aindea (Asisten Digital Bahasa Wolio) adalah proyek inovatif yang menggabungkan pelestarian budaya tradisional dengan teknologi Artificial Intelligence (AI) terkini. Proyek ini dirancang untuk menjadi jembatan bagi generasi digital dalam mempelajari dan melestarikan Bahasa Wolio, bahasa ibu Kesultanan Buton yang kaya akan nilai sejarah namun menghadapi tantangan digitalisasi.
portfolio.full_description_en: Aindea (Wolio Digital Assistant) is an innovative project that combines traditional cultural preservation with the latest Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology. This project is designed to be a bridge for the digital generation in learning and preserving the Wolio Language, the native language of the Buton Sultanate which is rich in historical value but faces digitalization challenges.
portfolio.process: Pengembangan melibatkan tiga tahap utama: 1. Context Loading (RAG-Lite approach) menggunakan database kamus ungkapan 1985. 2. Hybrid Proxying melalui Vercel Functions untuk keamanan API. 3. Grammar Evaluation khusus untuk akhiran vokal unik Bahasa Wolio.
portfolio.process_en: Development involved three main stages: 1. Context Loading (RAG-Lite approach) using the 1985 expression dictionary database. 2. Hybrid Proxying via Vercel Functions for API security. 3. Grammar Evaluation specifically for the unique vowel endings of the Wolio language.
portfolio.impact: Digitalisasi literatur klasik Buton, mempermudah akses budaya bagi generasi muda, dan membuktikan bahwa AI global dapat diadaptasi untuk dialek lokal yang sangat spesifik.
portfolio.impact_en: Digitalization of Buton's classic literature, facilitating cultural access for the younger generation, and proving that global AI can be adapted for very specific local dialects.
portfolio.tech_rationale: DeepSeek AI digunakan sebagai otak utama untuk penalaran bahasa yang superior, sementara Google Gemini berfungsi sebagai fallback cerdas. Arsitektur Serverless pada Vercel memastikan skalabilitas tanpa mengorbankan keamanan API key.
portfolio.tech_rationale_en: DeepSeek AI is used as the primary brain for superior language reasoning, while Google Gemini serves as a smart fallback. Serverless architecture on Vercel ensures scalability without compromising API key security.

portfolio.title: MBG One
portfolio.description: Platform manajemen operasional Makan Bergizi Gratis (MBG) terpadu. Rantai pasok, logistik, dan akuntabilitas dalam satu dashboard.
portfolio.description_en: Integrated operational management platform for the Makan Bergizi Gratis (MBG) program. Supply chain, logistics, and accountability in one dashboard.
portfolio.full_description: MBG One (Wahdah MBG Management) adalah platform manajemen operasional yang dirancang untuk mengelola ekosistem program Makan Bergizi Gratis secara menyeluruh. Sistem ini mengintegrasikan manajemen dapur umum, inventaris bahan baku, hingga koordinasi distribusi untuk ribuan siswa dalam satu platform yang transparan.
portfolio.full_description_en: MBG One (Wahdah MBG Management) is an operational management platform designed to manage the entire Makan Bergizi Gratis program ecosystem. The system integrates community kitchen management, raw material inventory, and distribution coordination for thousands of students in one transparent platform.
portfolio.process: Proses pengembangan dimulai dengan observasi alur kerja dapur umum dan logistik. Dilanjutkan dengan perancangan arsitektur database real-time untuk pelacakan stok, integrasi modul Maps untuk pemetaan distribusi, serta implementasi sistem monitoring error menggunakan Sentry.
portfolio.process_en: The development process began with observing the workflow of community kitchens and logistics. Continued with designing a real-time database architecture for stock tracking, integrating Maps modules for distribution mapping, and implementing an error monitoring system using Sentry.
portfolio.impact: Digitalisasi rantai pasok makanan yang kompleks, peningkatan akurasi inventaris bahan baku, serta penyediaan data real-time bagi pengambil kebijakan untuk meminimalkan food waste.
portfolio.impact_en: Digitalizing complex food supply chains, increasing raw material inventory accuracy, and providing real-time data for decision-makers to minimize food waste.
portfolio.tech_rationale: Supabase dipilih untuk skalabilitas dan fitur real-time yang krusial bagi koordinasi logistik yang cepat. Leaflet JS diintegrasikan untuk visualisasi titik distribusi secara akurat, sementara Sentry memastikan stabilitas sistem di lingkungan operasional yang sibuk.
portfolio.tech_rationale_en: Supabase was chosen for its scalability and real-time features, which are crucial for rapid logistics coordination. Leaflet JS is integrated for accurate visualization of distribution points, while Sentry ensures system stability in a busy operational environment.

portfolio.title: Bearboy
portfolio.description: Sistem informasi manajemen kesehatan dan sirkumsisi digital.
portfolio.description_en: Health management information system and digital circumcision.
portfolio.full_description: Bearboy adalah sistem informasi manajemen kesehatan yang dikembangkan khusus untuk memodernisasi layanan sirkumsisi (sunat). Platform ini mengintegrasikan pendaftaran online, manajemen pasien, hingga pemantauan kondisi pasca-sunat.
portfolio.full_description_en: Bearboy is a health management information system developed specifically to modernize circumcision services. The platform integrates online registration, patient management, and post-circumcision condition monitoring.
portfolio.impact: Digitalisasi layanan sunat tradisional menjadi lebih profesional, aman, dan memudahkan pemantauan medis oleh tenaga ahli secara jarak jauh.
portfolio.impact_en: Digitalizing traditional circumcision services to be more professional, safe, and facilitating remote medical monitoring by specialists.
portfolio.process: Proses pengerjaan meliputi desain antarmuka yang ramah anak, pengembangan sistem penjadwalan otomatis, dan integrasi API untuk sinkronisasi data rekam medis.
portfolio.tech_rationale: Next.js dengan Server-Side Rendering (SSR) memastikan data rekam medis pasien selalu sinkron secara instan dan aman. Laravel API memberikan struktur backend yang solid dengan sistem otentikasi berlapis untuk melindungi data sensitif pasien sesuai standar privasi kesehatan.
portfolio.tech_rationale_en: Next.js with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) ensures patient medical record data is always instantly synchronized and secure. Laravel API provides a solid backend structure with multi-layered authentication to protect sensitive patient data in accordance with health privacy standards.

portfolio.title: Simkes
portfolio.description: Sistem informasi manajemen kesehatan dan sirkumsisi digital.
portfolio.description_en: Hospital Management Information System for Clinics and Hospitals.
portfolio.full_description: SIMKES adalah sistem manajemen rumah sakit terpadu yang mencakup pendaftaran pasien, rekam medis elektronik, manajemen apotek, hingga sistem penagihan asuransi.
portfolio.full_description_en: SIMKES is an integrated hospital management system covering patient registration, electronic medical records, pharmacy management, and insurance billing systems.
portfolio.impact: Mempercepat proses pendaftaran pasien dan memastikan data medis tersimpan dengan aman serta mudah diakses oleh tenaga medis.
portfolio.impact_en: Speeding up the patient registration process and ensuring medical data is stored securely and easily accessible by medical personnel.
portfolio.process: Analisis alur kerja rumah sakit, perancangan skema database ACID compliant, dan pengembangan modul medis terintegrasi.
portfolio.process_en: Analysis of hospital workflows, design of ACID compliant database schemas, and development of integrated medical modules.
portfolio.tech_rationale: Laravel menjamin keamanan data sensitif pasien, sedangkan MySQL memberikan integritas data yang tinggi untuk laporan rekam medis yang kompleks.
portfolio.tech_rationale_en: Laravel guarantees the security of sensitive patient data, while MySQL provides high data integrity for complex medical record reports.

portfolio.title: Kassaone
portfolio.description: Project created in 2025.
portfolio.description_en: Advanced Point of Sales (POS) for Retail and Services.
portfolio.full_description: Kassaone adalah platform POS cloud yang dirancang untuk membantu UMKM mengelola stok, transaksi, dan laporan laba rugi secara otomatis. Dilengkapi dengan sistem manajemen inventaris yang cerdas.
portfolio.full_description_en: Kassaone is a cloud POS platform designed to help MSMEs manage stock, transactions, and profit/loss reports automatically. Equipped with an intelligent inventory management system.
portfolio.impact: Membantu ribuan UMKM beralih dari pencatatan manual ke sistem digital, mengurangi kesalahan perhitungan hingga 90%.
portfolio.impact_en: Helping thousands of MSMEs shift from manual recording to digital systems, reducing calculation errors by up to 90%.
portfolio.process: Riset kebutuhan UMKM, perancangan arsitektur cloud-first, dan iterasi UI berdasarkan feedback pengguna nyata.
portfolio.process_en: Researching MSME needs, designing a cloud-first architecture, and UI iteration based on real user feedback.
portfolio.tech_rationale: Firebase dipilih untuk sinkronisasi data real-time antar perangkat kasir, sementara Vue.js memberikan performa antarmuka yang sangat responsif bagi kasir yang sibuk.
portfolio.tech_rationale_en: Firebase was chosen for real-time data synchronization between cashier devices, while Vue.js provides a highly responsive interface performance for busy cashiers.

portfolio.title: Pesantrenteknologi
portfolio.description: Project created in 2025.
portfolio.description_en: School Information and Counseling Management System.
portfolio.full_description: Sirangkul adalah platform manajemen sekolah yang difokuskan pada bimbingan konseling dan pemantauan prestasi siswa. Membantu guru BK dalam mencatat dan menganalisis perkembangan santri.
portfolio.full_description_en: Sirangkul is a school management platform focused on counseling guidance and student achievement monitoring. Helping counseling teachers record and analyze student development.
portfolio.impact: Memudahkan pemantauan perilaku dan prestasi siswa secara digital, menggantikan buku catatan fisik yang sulit direkap.
portfolio.impact_en: Facilitating digital monitoring of student behavior and achievement, replacing physical notebooks that are difficult to recap.
portfolio.process: Wawancara dengan guru konseling, perancangan modul input yang mudah digunakan, dan pembuatan sistem laporan otomatis.
portfolio.process_en: Interviews with counseling teachers, design of easy-to-use input modules, and creation of an automatic report system.
portfolio.tech_rationale: Bootstrap dipilih agar sistem tetap responsif saat diakses guru melalui smartphone, sementara MySQL memastikan data perkembangan siswa tersimpan secara terpusat.
portfolio.tech_rationale_en: Bootstrap was chosen so the system remains responsive when accessed by teachers via smartphone, while MySQL ensures student development data is stored centrally.

writing.title: Revolusi Belajar: Mengapa Model 'Dibalik' (Flipped Classroom) Adalah Kunci Efisiensi di Pondok Informatika
writing.title_en: Learning Revolution: Why the 'Flipped' Model (Flipped Classroom) is the Key to Efficiency at Pondok Informatika
writing.description: Membahas model belajar Flipped Classroom dan Trias Akademika di Pondok Informatika untuk mencetak talenta IT yang tangguh di era Education 4.0.
writing.description_en: Discussing the Flipped Classroom and Trias Akademika learning model at Pondok Informatika to produce tough IT talent in the Education 4.0 era.

writing.title: Mengenal Kecanduan Gadget pada Anak: Perspektif Psikologi Klinis
writing.title_en: Understanding Gadget Addiction in Children: A Clinical Psychology Perspective
writing.description: Analisis mendalam mengenai mekanisme otak, gejala Compulsive Internet Use, dan dampak kesehatan mental pada remaja.
writing.description_en: In-depth analysis of brain mechanisms, Compulsive Internet Use symptoms, and mental health impacts on adolescents.

writing.title: Menjadi AI-Native Engineer
writing.title_en: Becoming an AI-Native Engineer: Paradigm Shift from Executor to Orchestrator
writing.description: Panduan mendalam mengenai fenomena AI-Native Engineer dan bagaimana hal ini mengubah industri pengembangan perangkat lunak secara fundamental.
writing.description_en: In-depth guide to the AI-Native Engineer phenomenon and how it is fundamentally changing the software development industry.

writing.title: Aindea
writing.description: Mengenal Aindea: Apotek Digital untuk Preservasi Bahasa Wolio melalui AI.
writing.description_en: Discover Aindea: A Digital Pharmacy for Wolio Language Preservation through AI.

writing.title: Sinergi Digital di Pulau Makassar: Catatan Penguji UKK SMKN 4 Baubau
writing.title_en: Digital Synergy on Makassar Island: Notes from SMKN 4 Baubau UKK Examiner
writing.description: Pengalaman berkesan mewakili Diskominfo Baubau dalam menguji kompetensi taruna TKJ di SMKN 4 Baubau.
writing.description_en: A memorable experience representing Diskominfo Baubau in testing the competency of TKJ cadets at SMKN 4 Baubau.

writing.title: Insight Media Group: Masa Depan Publikasi Digital
writing.title_en: Insight Media Group: The Future of Digital Publication
writing.description: Eksplorasi bagaimana Insight Media Group merevolusi dunia publikasi digital melalui integrasi teknologi.
writing.description_en: Exploring how Insight Media Group is revolutionizing the digital publication world through technology integration.

writing.title: Strategi Testing-First: Performa Maksimal Claude Code
writing.title_en: Testing-First Strategy: Maximum Claude Code Performance
writing.description: Bongkar rahasia efisiensi coding menggunakan AI Agent otonom melalui strategi automated testing yang ketat.
writing.description_en: Unlocking the secrets of coding efficiency using autonomous AI Agents through rigorous automated testing strategies.

writing.title: Meningkatkan Produktivitas dengan Claude Code
writing.description: Tips dan workflow lanjutan menggunakan Claude Code untuk coding lebih cepat.
writing.description_en: Advanced tips and workflows using Claude Code for faster coding.

writing.title: Pentingnya Literasi Digital di Era AI
writing.title_en: The Importance of Digital Literacy in the AI Era
writing.description: Memahami dan menyaring informasi di tengah perkembangan kecerdasan buatan.
writing.description_en: Understanding and filtering information amidst the rapid development of artificial intelligence.

writing.title: Engineer di Indonesia: Skill Tinggi, Risiko Penjara? 🚀
writing.title_en: Engineering in Indonesia: High Skill, High Risk? 🚀
writing.description: Analisis mendalam mengenai risiko hukum, hambatan birokrasi, dan krisis literasi digital bagi engineer di Indonesia.
writing.description_en: Deep analysis of legal risks, bureaucratic obstacles, and digital literacy crisis for engineers in Indonesia.

writing.title: Humankind: Sebuah Realisme Baru Tentang Hakikat Manusia
writing.title_en: Humankind: A New Realism About Human Nature
writing.description: Ulasan mendalam buku Humankind: A Hopeful History karya Rutger Bregman yang menantang pandangan sinis tentang sifat dasar manusia.
writing.description_en: An in-depth review of Rutger Bregman's Humankind: A Hopeful History, challenging the cynical view of human nature.

writing.title: Jangan Asal Pakai: Panduan Memilih AI Sesuai Kebutuhan
writing.title_en: Choosing the Right AI for Your Specific Needs
writing.description: Pelajari berbagai jenis Chat AI (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, dll) agar Anda tidak sekadar ikut-ikutan tren.
writing.description_en: Learn about various AI types (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) so you don't just follow the trend.
